examples: SIA/WSTS sales releases, SEMI wafer/equipment/materials releases, official industry reports.
allowed_use: Market size, cycle direction, source methodology, high-level end-market framing.
not_allowed_use: Do not infer company revenue, margins, valuation or market share without company/CIQ tie-out.

examples: Annual reports, 10-K/20-F, exchange filings, investor presentations, earnings calls and official IR tables.
allowed_use: Company description, segment exposure, customer concentration, products, capex, financial history.
not_allowed_use: Do not mix fiscal years, currencies or dual listings without explicit normalization.

examples: CIQ export: market cap, EV, FY revenue, GM, EV/Sales, P/E, consensus growth, ownership and short interest.
allowed_use: Valuation screens, comp tables, liquidity/ownership checks and estimate-revision monitoring.
not_allowed_use: Do not publish stale values or combine non-synchronous prices, shares and estimates.

examples: Priority tier, segment mapping, bull/base/bear variables, key debates, coverage waves and research actions.
allowed_use: Investment framing, research workflow, monitoring design and thesis/falsifier construction.
not_allowed_use: Do not present judgment as sourced fact; keep it separate from official data and CIQ fields.
